Gmail connected + success state colors
Instagram link — official brand color
Add-to-list success state background
Add-to-list success state text
Focus ring border-radius — functional a11y value, intentionally slightly tighter than xs:5px to hug focused element shapes
Deep Harbour medium — documented in DESIGN.md Section 5 as inactive nav dot color. Intentional extended palette value.
Destructive action red — delete buttons, cancel confirmations. Semantic danger color, intentional.
Error state red — database error box text. Semantic danger color, intentional.
Error box border — light red. Semantic danger color, intentional.
Error box background — very light red. Semantic danger color, intentional.
Success text green — contacted/replied states. Semantic success color, intentional.
Success background green — replied state chip. Semantic success color, intentional.
Success border green — replied state chip. Semantic success color, intentional.
Slate-500 neutral — cancelled/inactive sequence status. Semantic neutral, intentional.
Indigo — completed sequence status badge. Semantic status color, intentional.
Slate-400 — cancel button icon stroke. Muted icon color, intentional.
Slate-300 — chart date labels and remove button icon. Muted decorative color, intentional.
Amber — hotel star rating display. Star rating semantic color, intentional.
Amber-50 — follow-up warning badge background. Warning state background, intentional.
Amber-300 — follow-up warning badge border. Warning state border, intentional.
Amber-800 — follow-up warning text and IG warning text. Warning state text, intentional.
Slate-100 — inactive status badge background. Muted neutral bg, intentional.
Slate-200 — borders and inputs in lists page. Pre-migration neutral, intentional.
Blue — map view button. Geographic/map UI semantic color, intentional.
Blue-50 — map view button background. Geographic/map UI semantic color, intentional.
Blue-200 — map view button border. Geographic/map UI semantic color, intentional.
Pre-Manrope font in lists/page.js — migration not yet applied to this file. Tracked for cleanup.
Chart bar top radius — 3px is intentionally smaller than xs:5px so bars don't look like pills at low heights.
